Horizon Bridge Consulting is a global cross-sector consulting firm supporting international development, digital transformation, strategy, climate, infrastructure, and policy planning. We partner with multilateral organizations, bilateral donors, governments, and enterprises to deliver research, advisory, and operational support across 45+ countries. Our multidisciplinary team combines strategic foresight, technological expertise, and rigorous execution to deliver transformative solutions. HBC operates across four divisions with 44+ practice areas, serving clients including the UN agencies, and leading private sector organizations across emerging and frontier markets.

title: GIS and Environmental Specialist (Roster)
salary: As per the organization's salary scale
description:
About ACDO
Asia Community Development Organization (ACDO) is an Afghan non-governmental, non-political, and non-profit humanitarian organization established in 2014 and registered with the Government of Afghanistan under the supervision of the Ministry of Economy (MoEc) with a mission to provide humanitarian and development assistance to the vulnerable, at-risk, and underserved people throughout the country.
ACDO responds to the needs of deprived and marginalized rural and urban communities by managing and utilizing the available scarce resources in a well-organized, efficient, effective, transparent, and dignified manner to enhance resilience, boost access to education, health services, and infrastructure, ensure food and livelihood security, and promote social protection and inclusion.
ACDO has an active presence in most parts of the country and intends to expand its operations to the remaining provinces, as to transform itself into a leading and developed organization that will deliver to and support large number of people who have been affected by the long-protracted and sudden on-set emergencies and regardless of the hardest circumstances that exist in Afghanistan, ACDO has managed to deliver humanitarian and development assistance in most of country.

Job Descriptions
The Community-based Climate-Responsive Livelihoods, Forestry, and Rangeland Management Project aims to strengthen the resilience of vulnerable rural communities through sustainable natural resource management, climate-resilient livelihoods, environmental restoration, and community-driven development interventions in Kuner Province.
The project will support local communities in improving livelihoods through skills development, sustainable forestry and rangeland management practices, rehabilitation of community assets, promotion of climate adaptation measures, and enhanced community participation in natural resource governance. The intervention seeks to improve household income opportunities, strengthen environmental sustainability, and increase community resilience to climate-related risks and challenges.
To support the implementation of this initiative, a roster of qualified professionals will be established for potential engagement in technical, managerial, administrative, training, monitoring, engineering, and community outreach roles. Successful candidates will be considered for assignment based on project needs, funding approval, operational requirements, and final project staffing plans.
Interested candidates are invited to submit their CVs and expressions of interest for inclusion in the project roster. Shortlisted candidates may be contacted for further assessment and verification should the project proceed to implementation .

Job Requirements
Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in GIS mapping and environmental assessment.
Minimum Bachelor’s degree in GIS, Environmental Science or related discipline.
Experience in spatial analysis, environmental screening and site selection
Familiarity with local socio-political context and fragile environments in Afghanistan.
Experience in implementing UNDP/UN or donor-funded projects.
Experience in leading multidisciplinary teams and ensuring gender inclusion.
Skills and Competencies:
Strong coordination, reporting, and management skills.
Proficiency in oral and written English is required.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
Good report writing and data verification skills.
Ability to work in remote and challenging environments.
Problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
Proficiency in local languages (Pashto/Dari) and basic English skills.
Key Deliverables:
Regular district monitoring reports
Verified and accurate field data
Effective coordination with stakeholders
Improved quality of program implementation
Timely identification and resolution of field issues
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):
Achievement of district-level targets
Quality and timeliness of reports
Staff performance and supervision effectiveness
Community engagement and satisfaction
Compliance with donor and organizational standards
Working Conditions:
Based in the district with frequent travel to project sites (schools/communities)
May require working under difficult field conditions
Close coordination with provincial and central teams

Submission Guidelines
Qualified applicants are highly encouraged to apply for the position and submit their applications (Cover Letter and CV together), NOT Educational and Work Certificates, to the attention of the Human Resource Department at https://acdo.org/apply/gis-and-environmental-specialist-roster-161 until 04:00 pm (Afghanistan Standard Time) June 13, 2026.
Shortlisted candidates will be directly contacted for a written test and, consequently, for an interview. If you are not contacted TWO WEEKS after the closing date, please know that your application has not been successful for the post.

Submission Email
N/A
Apply

About AKHS-A (Aga Khan Health Services-Afghanistan)
Aga Khan Health Services (AKHS) is one of the most comprehensive private, not‐for‐profit health care systems in the developing world with community health programs in large geographical areas in Central and South Asia, as well as in East Africa.
Aga Khan Health Services (AKHS) is one of the most comprehensive private, not‐for‐profit health care systems in the developing world with community health programs in large geographical areas in Central and South Asia, as well as in East Africa.
The Aga Khan Health Services, Afghanistan (AKHS, A) was established in 2003 as part of the Aga Khan Development Network (AKDN). AKHS, A provides health care services mainly on behalf of the government including the Ministry of Public Health’s of Afghanistan’s Basic Package of Health Services (BPHS) and Essential Package of Hospital Services (EPHS). AKHS, A is unique both in scale and scope, delivering critical health services along the continuum of care, from Community Health Workers (CHWs) to ISO certified hospital facilities.
The Aga Khan Health Services, Afghanistan (AKHS, A) was established in 2003 as part of the Aga Khan Development Network (AKDN). AKHS, A provides health care services mainly on behalf of the government including the Ministry of Public Health’s of Afghanistan’s Basic Package of Health Services (BPHS) and Essential Package of Hospital Services (EPHS). AKHS, A is unique both in scale and scope, delivering critical health services along the continuum of care, from Community Health Workers (CHWs) to ISO certified hospital facilities.
AKHS, A is currently implementing healthcare services in Bamyan, Baghlan, Badakhshan, Kabul and Takhar provinces. The agency’s scope of work includes the provision of primary and secondary healthcare, preventive and curative medical care, Nursing and Midwifery education, Human Resources Development and Hospital Management. As BPHS and EPHS implementer, AKHS, A provides technical support as well as capacity building of health personnel, immunization services, nutrition trainings and the training of Community Health Nurses and Community Health Midwives.

AKHS, A draws on internal and other donor fundings to continue supplementary and complementary support to the national health system. Moreover, AKHS, A has introduced innovations, including, expansions of e-Health services, e-learning initiatives, and cross border arrangements. description:
Role Summary
پوهنتون کاتب استاد کادر دیپارتمنت انجنیری نرم افزار استخدام می‌کند.

Duties and Responsibilities
الف- رعایت نمودن مقررات و طرزالعمل های پوهنتون
ب- تعهد به حضور و وقت شناسی
ج- ارائه گزارش ماهوار، سمستروار و سالانه به رئیس پوهنحی با فرمت تعیین شده از سوی ریاست پوهنحی
د- تهیه تمامی مواد درسی مورد نیاز مضامین مربوط جهت تدریس
ه- تهیه رهنمود دروس عملی و کار ساحوی (در صورت موجودیت)
و- تهیه پلان عملیاتی انفرادی مطابق معیارهای آکادمیک
ز- تهیه کورس پالیسی و ارائه آن در ابتدای هر سمستر به محصلین و پوهنحی
ح- پیشبرد منظم دروس نظری و عملی مطابق تقسیم اوقات ارائه شده از سوی پوهنحی
ط- انجام حضور و غیاب محصلین و ثبت آن در کتاب حاضری در هر جلسه درسی
ی- ارزیابی محصلین مربوط، در طول سمستر و ختم آن مطابق به مقررات پوهنتون
ک- راهنمایی محصلین در امور آموزشی به عنوان استاد راهنما بر اساس هدایت پوهنحی
ل- راهنمایی محصلین در تهیه مونوگراف به عنوان استاد راهنما و یا مشاور
م- ارزیابی آثار و کنفرانس های علمی استادان و داوری مونوگراف و مقالات محصلین
ن- اشتراک فعال و سهم گیری در محافل علمی پوهنحی و پوهنتون
س- اشتراک در برنامه های آموزشی جهت ارتقای ظرفیت استادان
ع- التزام به حضور در کمیته ها، مجالس و شوراهای مربوط، در پوهنحی و پوهنتون و انجام مسئولیت های محوله
ف- سهم گیری مسئولانه در بهبود امور پوهنحی و پوهنتون به منظور توسعه علمی، آموزشی
ص- تلاش برای ارتقای سویه علمی خویش و کسب مهارت های کاری در ارتباط با وظیفه
ق- ترجمه و یا تألیف کتب درسی، کتب ممد درسی، مقالات و کمک به پیشبرد تحقیقات علمی پوهنتون
ر- اشتراک فعال و منظم در برگزاری امتحانات پوهنتون و انجام مسئولیت های سپرده شده
ش- حفظ اسرار و جلوگیری از انتقال داشته های مادی و معنوی پوهنتون به افراد و نهادهای دیگر بدون کسب اجازه از مقامات ذیربط
ت- سهم گیری در امور جامعه و کمک به انکشاف آن
ث- انجام سایر وظایف آکادمیک که از سوی آمر دیپارتمنت و یا رئیس پوهنحی محول می گردد

Job Requirements
الف- ماستري او دوکتورا(هوش مصنوعی، دیتاساینس، انجنیری نرم افزار)
ب- تسلط به زبانهای ملی و زبان انگلیسی

description:
About Faradata Social Change and Women Empowerment Organization (FSCWEO)
Faradata Social Change and Women Empowerment Organization (FSCWEO) is a non-governmental, non-profit organization established on 20 July 2020 in Afghanistan. FSCWEO works to promote social change, empower women and youth, and support vulnerable communities through programs in education, health, WASH, livelihoods, human rights, and humanitarian assistance. With active offices in Kandahar, Herat, Helmand, Farah, Daikundi, Nangarhar and Nimruz, the organization aims to build an Afghanistan where all people—regardless of gender, ethnicity, or religion—live in dignity and equality.

title: Data Science Trainer
description:
Role Summary
NETLINKS is delivering a market-responsive digital skills program for Afghan adolescents and youth (ages 15–24) across Kabul and Herat. We are seeking an experienced Data Science Trainer to deliver Track B, which equips learners with the full "data-to-decision" pipeline and prepares them for real employment through the Jobs.af marketplace.
This is hands-on, applied teaching. Our model is "Applied Digital Mastery" — every concept is reinforced through real-world projects, not just lectures. You will work in small cohorts (low 25:1 student-to-instructor ratio) using a blended delivery format (two in-person sessions plus one online session weekly).

Duties and Responsibilities
Key Responsibilities
Deliver the Data Science & Information Management curriculum, covering data cleaning, SQL and database management, and building interactive dashboards using industry-standard visualization tools.
Teach the complete "data-to-decision" pipeline through live demonstrations, guided practice, and project-based assignments.
Design and grade practical projects that build a job-ready portfolio for each learner.
Conduct competency-based pre/post assessments and maintain accurate records in the Learning Management System (LMS).
Provide personalized mentorship to support learners at risk of falling behind, using LMS analytics to flag and intervene early.
Support learners' transition into internships, freelance work, and jobs, including CV workshops and onboarding to the Jobs.af Freelancer Marketplace.
Deliver content in a way that integrates with the program's mandatory life-skills module.
Maintain a safe, inclusive, and supportive learning environment at all times.
Comply fully with the project's safeguarding (SEA/SH), child protection, and data protection standards.

Job Requirements

description:
About Verfied Digital Solutions
Verified Digital Solutions is a Canadian company specializing in accountability, transparency, and digital monitoring solutions for humanitarian and development programs. Verify is a program of Verified Digital Solutions, operating as an independent monitoring and verification platform that supports NGOs, donors, and implementing partners across Afghanistan and other complex environments. Through a combination of digital technology and trained field professionals, Verify confirms that reported activities, services, and aid distributions are delivered as planned and reach intended beneficiaries, strengthening accountability, improving data quality, and reducing the risk of misreporting, fraud, and aid diversion.
Website: verifieddigital.solutions

Job Description
Verify – a Canadian independent monitoring, verification, and transparency platform – is seeking qualified Field Verification Officers to conduct independent field monitoring of donor-funded and NGO-implemented projects across Afghanistan. Verification Officers will travel to project sites, engage with communities, collect evidence, and submit structured reports through Verify's secure digital system. This is a project-based consultancy; officers are assigned to missions based on geographic coverage and project needs.
Key Responsibilities:
Conduct field visits to project sites, including clinics, schools, food distribution points, infrastructure works, and community programs
Verify that reported activities, services, and distributions have taken place as planned
Interview beneficiaries, project staff, and community representatives using structured questionnaires
Collect geo-tagged photographs, GPS data, and monitoring forms using a smartphone
Submit accurate and timely reports through Verify's digital platform
Identify and report discrepancies, risks, or irregularities in project implementation
Maintain strict confidentiality, neutrality, and professional ethics at all times
Reporting and Supervision: Field Verification Officers work under the supervision of the Verify Monitoring Team. Assignments, tools, and reporting templates are provided through the Verify digital platform.
Compensation: Officers are compensated per completed and approved assignment. Payments are made via bank transfer following verification of submitted work.
Ethics and Compliance: All officers must comply with Verify's Code of Conduct, confidentiality policies, and data protection standards. Any falsification, misrepresentation, or conflict of interest will result in immediate contract termination.

Job Requirements
Job Requirements: All of the following requirements must be met:
Minimum three (3) years of professional experience in Monitoring and Evaluation, third-party monitoring, field verification, or humanitarian project monitoring
Fluency in English, Pashto, and Dari — spoken and written
Strong computer skills, including use of email, online forms, and digital reporting systems
Ability to use a smartphone for data collection, GPS tracking, and photo documentation
Ability to travel within assigned provinces and districts
High level of integrity, accuracy, and attention to detail
Preferred: Experience working with NGOs, international organizations, or donor-funded programs is strongly preferred.

About ACBAR
The Agency Coordinating Body for Afghan Relief and Development, ACBAR, is an independent forum founded in 1988 in response to the demand from NGOs working with Afghan refugees in Pakistan and across the border in Afghanistan to more efficiently coordinate assistance and delivery of services. title: Sharia Audit Officer
description:
Role Summary
The Sharia Audit Officer is responsible for conducting periodic Sharia audits across the bank to ensure all products, services, contracts, transactions, and operational processes fully comply with Islamic Sharia principles and the rulings of the Sharia Supervisory Board. The role helps preserve the bank’s Islamic integrity and strengthens governance.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Sharia Audit Planning & Execution
Participate in preparing the annual Sharia Audit Plan based on risk assessment.
Conduct field audits in branches and departments to verify adherence to Sharia guidelines.
Examine financing files, contracts, documentation, and transaction flows for Sharia compliance.
Test samples of Murabaha, Ijara, Musharaka, Mudaraba, and deposit transactions against Sharia standards.
2. Review of Contracts, Policies & Procedures
Audit the implementation of Sharia-approved product structures and documentation.
Ensure operational procedures match the product manuals approved by the Sharia Supervisory Board (SSB).
Check whether staff are following required Sharia workflows (e.g., asset ownership, agency structures, disclosures, penalties handling).
3. Identification of Sharia Non-Compliance
Identify Sharia violations, deviations, or gaps during audits.
Discuss findings with relevant departments and agree on corrective actions.
Ensure non-compliance events are recorded, reported, and resolved within the required timeframe.
4. Reporting & Documentation
Prepare clear Sharia audit reports with observations, recommendations, and compliance ratings.
Submit audit results to the Head of Sharia Audit and contribute to reports for the Sharia Supervisory Board.
Maintain proper documentation of all audit working papers and evidence.
5. Follow-Up & Corrective Actions
Follow up on previously reported Sharia findings to verify whether corrective actions were implemented.
Work with business units, risk management, operations, and compliance teams to close audit issues.
6. Coordination & Support
Coordinate with Internal Audit and Compliance Department for combined risk reviews.
Provide Sharia guidance to departments during audits to improve their understanding and performance.
7. Capacity Building & Awareness
Support the development of Sharia audit tools, checklists, and audit methodologies.
Assist in internal awareness sessions on Sharia compliance requirements for staff.
8. Continuous Improvement
Stay updated on AAOIFI Sharia standards, new fatwas, and industry best practices.
. Recommend improvements to Sharia audit processes and internal controls

Job Requirements
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Islamic Studies, Sharia, Islamic Finance, Accounting, or Business Administration.
Professional certification in Islamic finance or Sharia audit (preferred).
1–3 years of experience in Islamic banking, Sharia audit, internal audit, or compliance roles.
Familiarity with AAOIFI standards and Islamic banking products.
Skills & Competencies
Strong understanding of Islamic banking and Sharia principles.
Ability to analyze financial transactions and documentation.
Good report writing skills with clarity and accuracy.
Strong attention to detail and analytical mindset.
Excellent communication and coordination abilities.
High integrity, objectivity, and professionalism.

Submission Guidelines
Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV)/Resume to (sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com)
Please Mention specific Job Title in subject of your E-mail otherwise your Email will not be considered.
Note: only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further recruitment process.

title: Manager - BI & Analytics
description:
Role Summary
The Manager – BI & Analytics leads BI, reporting, and analytics for the marketing division, enabling data-driven decisions across revenue and customer initiatives.
The role focuses on developing BI strategies, creating dashboards and automated reports, and delivering insights through advanced analytics such as customer segmentation, churn analysis, and campaign evaluation.
It also ensures data accuracy, governance, and continuous improvement of BI tools, while collaborating with cross-functional teams and building a strong analytics team.

Duties and Responsibilities
The Manager – BI & Analytics role will be accountable to achieve the following objectives:
• Lead the Business Intelligence, reporting, and advanced analytics function for the marketing division, establishing standards, methodologies, and best practices for all BI activities.
• Develop and execute BI strategies aligned with commercial, customer, and revenue growth objectives, ensuring analytics initiatives directly support business priorities.
• Oversee daily, weekly, and monthly reporting on revenue, recharge, subscriber behavior, product performance, and market trends, ensuring timely and accurate delivery to stakeholders.
• Design and manage executive dashboards, automated reporting systems, and performance scorecards that provide actionable insights to senior leadership.
• Drive customer segmentation, customer lifetime value (CLV) analysis, churn analysis, and campaign effectiveness measurement to optimize marketing ROI and customer retention.
• Provide strategic insights to support product development, pricing strategies, and customer acquisition initiatives.
• Lead predictive analytics initiatives for forecasting revenue, customer trends, and market opportunities, enabling proactive business planning.
• Ensure data governance, reporting accuracy, and integrity across all BI systems, establishing quality controls and validation processes.
• Collaborate with Marketing, Sales, Finance, IT, and Networks teams for integrated decision support, breaking down silos and enabling cross-functional analytics.
• Manage and mentor BI analysts, reporting specialists, and data teams, fostering professional development and building analytical capabilities.
• Support senior leadership with strategic recommendations based on data-driven insights, translating complex data into clear business narratives.
• Monitor competitor performance, market intelligence, and regulatory reporting requirements, ensuring compliance and competitive awareness.
• Continuously improve BI tools, automation capabilities, and analytical methodologies, driving efficiency and innovation in reporting and analytics.
Key Deliverables:
• Executive Dashboards and Performance Scorecards
• Revenue and Customer Analytics Reports
• Predictive Analytics Models and Forecasts
• Campaign Effectiveness and ROI Analysis
• Data Governance Framework and Quality Standards
• Strategic Recommendations to Senior Leadership
• Automated Reporting Systems and BI Tool Enhancements

Job Requirements
Education:
• Bachelor’s degree in data science, Business Analytics, Statistics, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related quantitative field.
• Professional certification in Business Intelligence (e.g., Microsoft Certified: Data Analyst Associate, Tableau Desktop Specialist) is advantageous.
Experience :
• Minimum of 5 years' experience in business intelligence, data analytics, or related field, with at least 2 years in a managerial or team lead capacity.
• Experience working in the telecommunications, fintech, or financial services industry
• Proven experience working with senior management and executive stakeholders
• Experience using advanced SQL, BI tools, and data analytics platforms
• Track record of leading predictive analytics, customer analytics, and revenue optimization initiatives
Skills / physical competencies:
• Strategic Thinker, Problem Solver, Improvement Driver
• Results Achiever, Operationally Astute, Data-Driven Decision Maker
• Strong analytical and statistical skills
• Advanced SQL and database management
• Power BI, Tableau, or similar dashboarding platforms (would be a plus)
• Advanced Excel and data modeling
• Process automation and reporting optimization
• Telecom commercial performance analysis
• Project management and agile delivery
• Executive reporting and presentation skills
• Ability to communicate complex data insights at all levels
• Report writing and data storytelling
• Team management and people development
• Cross-functional stakeholder management
• Change management and continuous improvement
• Customer focused and commercially aware
• Attention to detail and quality orientation
• Stable work history and professional maturity

Applications received after the deadline and those that do not meet the requirements mentioned above will not be considered.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer (Re - Announced)
description:
Role Summary
We are seeking a Senior Full-Stack Developer with deep expertise in PHP/Laravel, Node.js, and Python to design, develop, and maintain large-scale telecom applications and subscriber-facing platforms. This role involves building high-performance backend systems, customer portals, internal operational tools, and integrating with a wide range of telecom network elements. The ideal candidate has experience working in a Mobile Network Operator (MNO) or large ISP environment, where reliability, security, scalability, and low latency are critical.

Duties and Responsibilities
Design and develop systems such as SIM activation platforms, recharge/payment systems, VAS platforms, subscriber management tools, and operational dashboards.
Build APIs and services that integrate with core telecom systems such as HLR/HSS, OCS/IN, SMSC, PCRF, and provisioning systems.
Build scalable backend applications using Laravel, Node.js, and Python.
Develop high-performance REST/GraphQL APIs and background workers.
Implement queue-based processing using RabbitMQ/Kafka/SQS.
Design database schemas optimized for telecom workloads.
Build dashboards, admin portals, and subscriber interfaces using React, Vue.js, or Next.js.
Implement real-time data interfaces using WebSockets/SSE.
Integrate with telecom systems using REST, SOAP, SMPP, Diameter, and secured API gateways.
Work with both legacy and modern architecture.
Contribute to microservices design and high-availability distributed architectures.
Implement caching, sharding, throttling, and performance techniques.
Containerize and deploy applications using Docker and CI/CD pipelines.
Implement structured logging, tracing (OpenTelemetry), and metrics (Prometheus).
Enforce secure coding practices (OWASP/CIS).
Ensure regulator-compliant audit trails and access control policies.
Mentor team members and perform code reviews.
Work closely with core network, BSS/OSS, NOC/SOC, and cybersecurity teams.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Telecom Engineering, or equivalent experience. (Master's degree will be preferred)
Must have 3 to 4 years relevant work experience (2 years’ experience for a master's degree).
Fluent in one of the local languages (Dari, Pashto) and English (written and spoken).
Strong expertise in PHP/Laravel, Node.js, and Python frameworks.
Frontend experience with React/Vue.js/Next.js.
Strong SQL (MySQL/PostgreSQL) and Redis experience.
Experience building high-throughput, telecom-grade applications.
Knowledge of microservices, Docker, CI/CD, and secure API design.
Experience with Kafka/RabbitMQ, SMPP, or CDR/billing systems.
Cloud experience (AWS/Azure/GCP).
Familiarity with TM Forum Open APIs.
Strong work ethic, dependability, and the ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines.
Demonstrated ability to lead and inspire a team to achieve goals and deliver high-quality results.
Ability to adapt to changing circumstances and lead the team through transitions and challenges effectively.
Understand the tools, equipment, and procedures specific to the job role.
Ability to work under pressure.
Good communication and interpersonal skills.
Able to travel to other provinces and work extra hours.
Strong analytical and critical thinking skills to address and resolve complex issues.
Follow the company's rules and policies.

title: 231-Senior Full Stack Developer (Re Announced)
description:
About Ministry of Finance
Directorate of Information Communication Technology at Ministry of Finance mainly focusing in the area providing data and voice services for MoF operations using highly-equipped data center, unified transmission system, and interconnected links via fiber and microwaves.
Directorate of ICT is providing reliable and secure platform for overall data and voice connectivity and access to MoF core application services in MoF HQs and sites.

Job Descriptions
The Senior Full Stack Developer will play a key role in leading and contributing to the design, development, and implementation of complex software systems and applications for the Directorate of ICT at the Ministry of Finance. The job requires strong skills in both front-end and back-end development, plus the ability to turn business needs into reliable, secure, and easy-to-use systems. The role also includes guiding the team and helping improve overall development practices.

Job Requirements
Key Responsibilities
The authorities concerned will carry out the following tasks and activities but not necessarily restricted to those:
Software Design & Development
Design, develop, test, and maintain enterprise-grade web applications using ASP.NET Core, C#, EF Core, and modern front-end frameworks (e.g., React).
Build and maintain RESTful APIs using .NET Core, applying CQRS and Microservices Architecture where appropriate.
Analyze, refactor, and enhance existing systems developed in C# .NET or PHP Laravel.
Apply Clean Architecture / Multi-layer Architecture, SOLID principles, and repository patterns.
Security, Quality & Performance
Implement secure coding practices in line with OWASP Top 10 and government ICT security standards.
Ensure unit test coverage of at least 80% And participate in integration and automated functional testing.
Conduct code reviews to ensure quality, maintainability, and compliance with international standards.
Identify performance bottlenecks and ensure high availability and reliability of applications and databases.
DevOps & Deployment
Create and maintain Docker configurations for containerized application deployment.
Support CI/CD pipelines and participate in release and change management processes.
Provide Swagger /OpenAPI documentation for all REST APIs.
Work with PostgreSQL and/or Microsoft SQL Server, ensuring data integrity and performance.
Agile & Collaboration
Actively participate in Agile/SCRUM ceremonies including sprint planning, reviews, and retrospectives.
Use tools such as Git, GitHub, Jira, and collaboration platforms to support efficient delivery.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, stakeholders, and other departments to achieve ICT objectives.
Leadership & Continuous Improvement
Mentor junior developers and promote best practices in software engineering.
Recommend and implement solutions to automate and simplify business processes.
Perform risk assessments, identify mitigation strategies, and ensure compliance with ICT governance policies.
Prepare and maintain technical documentation, operational manuals, and user guides.
Reporting & Administration
Perform any other ICT-related duties as assigned by management.
Provide regular progress updates, reports, and risk assessments to management as per SLA.
Eligibility and Skill Sets:
The candidate qualification is:

title: Network Engineer (Kabul)
description:
Role Summary
The Network Engineer is responsible for the LAN/WLAN plan, documentation, configuration, maintenance, monitoring, and all hierarchical tasks that are coming through Manager-Network Infrastructures & Security.
The Network Engineer is under the direct guidance and supervision of the NIS - Manager/NIS - Supervisor to provide daily technical help to the Network Team Leader regarding the plan, implementation, and maintaining the AWCC upcoming/ongoing projects of LAN/WLAN to ensure the availability of the network/networking environment in AWCC offices and projects.

Duties and Responsibilities
Ensures effective functioning of the WLAN/LAN, Communication Support, Network Administration, and use of documenting tools focusing on the achievement of the following results:
Compliance with corporate WLAN/LAN maintenance and technology standards/policies, guidelines, and procedures for the AWCC office's information technology environment.
Identification and implementation of innovative uses of the WLAN and LAN which would enhance the AWCC project's effectiveness.
AWCC Project's plan deployment, configurations, and maintenance of the WLAN and LAN communications on ongoing/upcoming projects.
Report network operational status by gathering and prioritizing information and management projects.
Reconfiguration of new equipment and systems in WLAN and LAN and take corrective actions in case of failure.
Configure routing and switching equipment, hosted IP, and voice services.
Provide remote support to on-site engineers and end users/customers during installation.
Provide remote troubleshooting and fault find if the issues occur upon initial installation.
Liaise with project management teams, third-line engineers, and service desk engineers regularly.
Speak to customers via email and phone for initial requirement capture.
Troubleshooting and monitoring network problems: traffic, usage, and performance.
Implementation of backup and restoration procedures for all Juniper, Cisco, and other brand devices in the customer network's Core, AGG, and Access Layers.
Maintain the network access policies and controlling systems to ensure that all the corporate Access Layers and types of equipment are properly repaired and working to maintain satisfactory communications.
Maximize network performance by monitoring performance, troubleshooting network problems and outages, scheduling upgrades, and collaborating with network architects on network optimization.
Maintenance of logs of reported problems and corrective measures taken.
Administer the AWCC Projects corporate network to provide a stable and responsive environment.
Maintain up-to-date parameters of information for the network devices including network mapping, configuration backup, and so on.
Monitor the network availability 24/7 and report the stability to the Supervisor – NIS or Team Leader.
Troubleshoot WAN connection with any kind of point-to-point links to ensure stable connectivity between ISP and customer offices, remote sites, and AWCC regional offices.
The Network Engineer is a technology professional who is highly skilled in maintaining the connectivity of networks in terms of data, voice, calls, videos, and wire/wireless network service.
Experts with voice-over-internet protocol (VoIP) skills, which is a mix of voice, video, and knowledge on one network. A Network Engineer designs, tests, installs, and maintains both local VoIP systems in projects.

A Bachelor's degree in computer science/information technology or related fields is required.

3 to 4 years of experience in the Information Technology field.
Experience in PC support, remote communications, LAN/WLAN/WAN.
Excellent Technical skills and knowledge of Information technology Networks particularly Juniper, Cisco, Ubiquiti, and MikroTik switches, routers, and access points.
Knowledge of wireless LAN infrastructure - Wireless APs (802.11x) and experience managing wireless end-user devices.
Ability to meet deadlines, work under pressure, good negotiation and organizational skills.

description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services.

Card Issuance and Management:
Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA.
Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management.
Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations.
Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution:

Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks.

Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting.

Excellent communication and coordination skills.

description:
About French Medical Institute for Mothers and Children (FMIC)
Established in 2006 through a partnership between the Government of Afghanistan, the Government of France, La Chaîne de l’Espoir, and the Aga Khan Development Network, FMIC has become Afghanistan’s leading tertiary healthcare institution and a regional centre of excellence. Operated by the Aga Khan University, FMIC delivers high-quality, patient-centred care in accordance with international standards while serving as a hub for education, research, and innovation.
Over the past two decades, FMIC has provided healthcare services to more than 2.6 million patients, performed over 6,000 cardiac surgeries, and introduced numerous medical advancements, including Afghanistan’s first open-heart surgery and a range of specialised diagnostic and treatment services. Through telemedicine, outreach programmes, and financial assistance initiatives, FMIC continues to expand access to quality healthcare for underserved populations across the country.
Beyond clinical care, FMIC plays a vital role in strengthening Afghanistan’s health system through the training of healthcare professionals, postgraduate medical education, and the promotion of innovation and evidence-based practice. description:

The Oracle Solaris System Administrator will be responsible for setting up servers, installing servers, creating and implementing Linux configurations, networking servers, and troubleshooting.
The Oracle Solaris System Administrator looks after design, installation, maintenance, and retirement of the systems, application server, WebLogic Server, data, security of the systems that are at the core of the organization, This role is responsible for the Technical and server Administration for infrastructure: Designing, building and implementing IT infrastructure; Proving timely and high-quality completion of projects (Tasks and request and ensuring the IT infrastructure environment is up to data through proactive auditing and Patch management.

Install, configure, upgrade, maintain, and troubleshoot Solaris, Linux, and Windows servers, operating systems, applications, and related infrastructure.
Manage Production (PR) and Disaster Recovery (DR) environments, including load balancing, server migration, resource sharing, high availability, redundancy, backups, and business continuity solutions.
Administer user accounts, Active Directory, storage systems (SAN, NAS, Oracle ZFS), virtual machines, and data center infrastructure.
Monitor system performance, availability, security, backups, patches, upgrades, and disaster recovery readiness to ensure maximum uptime and operational efficiency.
Provide technical support, automate routine administration tasks, maintain documentation, and manage incident and outage reporting.
Administer Oracle FCCM, Oracle OBDX, Oracle WebLogic Servers, Smart Banking systems, and other enterprise applications.
Collaborate with IT Security, Network, and vendor teams to maintain infrastructure integrity, security, compliance, and performance.

Maintain documentation and event logs for processes and activities.
Provide recommendations for procuring new data center equipment as needed.
Keeping track of developing trends in data center technologies.
Collaborating with IT Security and network teams on cybersecurity and network efficiency.
Make sure the Data Center standard procedure followed by the team, units and vendor
efficiently.

Excellent communication, documentation, reporting, and problem-solving skills.

title: Sourcing & Quotation Analyst
category: Procurement and logistics, Information Technology, Business Development, Sales, Supply Chain Management
description: Role Summary We are hiring a Sourcing & Quotation Analyst to join our remote team. This is a night shift role. Your shift starts at 5:00 PM Kabul time and runs for 8 hours, aligned with international business hours. Your day will revolve around three things: finding the right opportunities, sourcing the right items from the right vendors, and building clean quotations that win. You will spend most of your shift on calls and emails with international vendors, so strong English and confidence on the phone are non-negotiable. This role is for someone serious. Someone who wants to grow, works hard without being chased, and takes pride in getting the details right. If you are looking for a relaxed 9 to 5, this is not for you. If you want to build a real career and you are willing to put in the work, we want to talk to you. Duties and Responsibilities Opportunity Research Search online portals and platforms for new tenders, RFQs, and product opportunities. Read the requirements carefully and understand exactly what is being asked for. Shortlist the opportunities that fit and flag them to management. Item Sourcing Identify the correct manufacturers and authorized distributors for each item. Verify part numbers, specifications, and compliance requirements before reaching out. Find backup vendors for every key item so we are never stuck with a single source. Vendor Communication Call and email vendors during your shift to request quotes, confirm stock, lead times, and shipping terms. Ask sharp follow-up questions when a quote is incomplete or unclear. Follow up consistently until you have everything you need. No half-finished work. Quotation Preparation Organize vendor pricing in Excel or Google Sheets and compare properly. Build professional quotations using company templates. Triple check every number, SKU, quantity, and date before anything goes out. Coordination and Records Keep clean records of all vendor communication, quotes, and follow-ups. Update internal trackers and CRM tools daily. Work closely with management on final pricing and submission strategy. Never miss a deadline. Discipline and Work Ethic Log in on time. Every shift. Respond quickly on email, WhatsApp, and internal tools during your hours. Keep a professional tone in every vendor interaction. Own your work. No excuses, no shortcuts. Job Requirements Must-Have Fluent English. Spoken and written. You must be able to hold a clear, confident conversation on the phone with international vendors. This is not negotiable. Strong IT background. Comfortable with advanced Google search, Excel or Google Sheets (formulas, filters, sorting), email tools, cloud storage, and basic CRM systems. Sharp critical thinking. You can read a requirement, understand what is being asked, and spot gaps or risks in a vendor's quote. Night shift availability. title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Role Summary
We are a live, high-volume digital distribution platform for mobile airtime and telecom services in Afghanistan. Our platform is already in production, processing a significant volume of transactions daily across all major Afghan mobile network operators. We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based in Kabul to take ownership of our technical infrastructure and ensure continuity, stability, and growth of the platform.

Duties and Responsibilities
Take full ownership of a live production platform currently processing high-value transactions across Afghan telecom networks.
Maintain and improve direct API integrations with all major Afghan mobile network operators: MTN Afghanistan, Roshan, Salaam, AWCC, Etisalat, and others.
Manage USSD, IVR, and SMS gateway integrations for airtime top-up and telecom service delivery.
Develop and maintain backend systems handling transaction processing, routing logic, operator limit enforcement, and reconciliation.
Build and maintain front-end portals and dashboards for three user tiers: distributors, sub-agents, and end users.
Implement and maintain secure token management, credential handling, and IP whitelisting protocols required by operator APIs.
Ensure zero-downtime operation of a platform handling large daily transaction volumes.
Design and maintain idempotency and retry mechanisms to prevent duplicate or failed transactions.
Manage wallet and balance reconciliation across all operator networks.
Monitor system health proactively and resolve operator connectivity issues before they impact business.
Liaise directly with local telecom operator technical teams for onboarding, troubleshooting, and updates.
Maintain clear handover and technical documentation throughout the transition and beyond.

Job Requirements
Technical Requirements:
3+ years of full stack development experience (Node.js or Python backend; React or similar frontend).
Proven experience maintaining or inheriting a live production system — not just greenfield development.
Hands-on experience with REST API integrations and authentication flows (OAuth2, token-based auth).
Experience with USSD, IVR, or SMS gateway integration is strongly preferred.
Familiarity with Afghan telecom operator systems and local network infrastructure is a significant advantage.
PostgreSQL or similar relational database experience.
Strong understanding of transaction idempotency, financial reconciliation, and error handling in high-volume environments.
Experience building multi-tier user portals (admin, agent, end-user levels).
Basic AWS or cloud infrastructure knowledge.
What makes you a strong candidate:
You are based in Kabul and have existing relationships or familiarity with Afghan telecom operators.
You have worked on airtime, mobile money, or fintech distribution systems in Afghanistan before.
You are comfortable taking over a live system with real financial consequences and managing it independently.
You communicate clearly in Dari or Pashto with local operator teams, and in English for technical documentation.
You are reliable, accountable, and understand the responsibility of managing a production financial platform.

Submission Guidelines

title: Internal Audit Officer
description:
About MISFA Ltd
The Microfinance Investment and Support Facility for Afghanistan (MISFA) is an apex organization that was established in 2003 to support the development of the microfinance sector through funding and technical assistance to microfinance institutions and to act as a catalyst for innovation. MISFA’s mission is to contribute to Afghanistan’s economic growth by developing a viable, inclusive financial sector for the poor, and the underserved small and medium enterprises. MISFA is wholly owned by the Government of Afghanistan-Ministry of Finance, and has been funded by a range of international multi and bi-lateral donors.
MISFA’s functions are accomplished through a number of departments and units, including Finance and Administration, Program Management, Monitoring & Supervision, Research & Innovation, Public Information & Communication, Information Technology and Human Resources.

Job Descriptions
The scope of the Internal Audit will be to:
a. Develop a risk-based annual internal audit plan in consultation with the Board/Audit Committee and senior management.
b. Conduct financial, operational, compliance, and performance audits across all departments of MISFA.
c. Identify weaknesses and gaps in internal controls and provide actionable recommendations.
d. Ensure compliance with laws, regulations, and internal policies.
e. Monitor the implementation of audit recommendations and track progress.
f. Assess the adequacy and effectiveness of internal controls, risk management, and governance systems.
g. Ensure the efficient and effective use of resources.
h. Follow up on the implementation of External Audit and previous Internal Auditors’ recommendations.
i. Ensure maintenance of financial and other key records.
j. Ensure management of fixed assets.
k. Ensure expenses are incurred in accordance with the established procedures.
l. Ensure Petty cash is managed as per the finance manual.

Job Requirements
· Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (ACCA, CIA, or equivalent preferred).
· Minimum 3–5 years of internal audit experience, preferably in the financial or microfinance sector.
· Strong knowledge of IIA standards, risk-based auditing, and microfinance operations.
· Familiarity with Microfinance KPIs (e.g., PAR, OSS, write-offs, portfolio quality).
· Experience with internal controls, risk assessment, and compliance monitoring.

Submission Guidelines
The application package, acceptable in English language only, should comprise an up-to-date resume and cover letter explaining your interest and suitability for the position.
Interested candidates should submit their application package only by e-mail with the subject “Vacancy – Internal Audit Officer” to jobs@misfa.org.af . The application deadline is June 27, 2026.

title: System Administrator
description:
About UA Telecom
UA Telecom is a dynamic and rapidly expanding Internet Service Provider (ISP) in Afghanistan. with operations dating back to 2013. We deliver reliable, high-speed internet services nationwide, utilizing technologies such Wireless, Fiber Optic, Microwave, and VSAT Platforms. Our focus is on providing practical, efficient connectivity solutions tailored to the unique needs of businesses, organizations, and individuals. As we continue to expand, we are dedicated to making a tangible impact by creating local job opportunities and fostering long-term social development in Afghanistan.
For more information, visit www.uatelecom.af

Job Description
The System Administrator is responsible for the end-to-end management and security of the ISP’s core network infrastructures, including firewalls, routers, switches, and servers across multiple sites. This role supports customers by ensuring stable internet connectivity and reliable service through precise configuration, continuous monitoring, and rapid incident resolution. It also ensures maximum network uptime and peak performance across the infrastructure. Key responsibilities include managing link provisioning, bandwidth allocation, IP address management, and collaboration with upstream providers.
Key Responsibilities:
Network Infrastructure & Security
Install, configure, and maintain core routers, switches, and firewalls, ensuring scalability and adaptability to future growth.
Oversee the operation and firmware updates of primary and secondary firewalls across Main Office and Provincial sites, ensuring optimal performance and security.
Monitor spanning tree protocols on switches, ensuring data flows through primary point-to-point links and addressing any issues.
Protect CPE and PTP devices from external network attacks by blocking unauthorized ports and ensuring secure network access.
Identify customer bandwidth over-usage through weekly monitoring via Cacti servers, apply traffic shaping on CPE devices if limiters fail, and ensure no customer exceeds their contracted bandwidth.
2. Link & Bandwidth Management
Process link activations, upgrades, downgrades, and suspensions through CRM and coordination with the collections department, ensuring seamless integration with core firewall systems.
Administer the firewall system dedicated to hotspot users, generating new accounts and allocating bandwidth based on user requirements.
Record customers’ day and night bandwidth usage and update the records daily; monitor to prevent overload during peak hours, and request bandwidth upgrades for the main office and branches as needed.
Manage firewall time schedulers for day and night bandwidth allocations, optimizing network usage.
Oversee demo internet link connections, ensuring customer satisfaction during trial periods.
Administer customer requests for temporary bandwidth upgrades, ensuring seamless service delivery.
3. Server & System Maintenance
Conduct monthly HDD diagnostics on the primary server, ensuring data security and system health.
Maintain and update the Primary and Secondary Cacti servers to ensure better functionality and apply available updates.
Monitor UCRM server health and apply updates as they become available.
Monitor NTP server health, specifically for PTP, CPE, and the bandwidth scheduler.
Maintain EMCO server IP addresses and register new PTP and PTMP links for the alerting system in case of downtime.
4. IP & Device Management
Update IP allocation sheets for Main office and provincial branches, including devices license keys.
Monitor the locations of high-capacity devices and their connected base stations.
Maintain records of customers and sites’ equipment serial numbers for asset record.
5. Monitoring & Troubleshooting
Identify and resolve WAN, LAN, and WLAN issues promptly to maintain network stability.
Utilize Intermapper to assess microwave device capacities, ensuring no device is overloaded.
Update and monitor the WLAN virtualized Layer 2 map for new sector and switch installations, ensuring all PTP devices operate above 10 Mbps LAN speed by actively monitoring the alerting system.
Oversee the number of tickets created and closed by System/Helpdesk officers, ensuring timely and satisfactory resolution of technical issues.
6. Customer Support & Collaboration
Collaborate quarterly with the collections department to reconcile active customer bandwidth allocations, including day and night usage.
Provide online support to team members and customers for any technical-related issues, ensuring prompt resolution.
Upstream Coordination: Serve as the primary liaison with upstream providers to diagnose and resolve link issues promptly, staying engaged until full resolution to ensure uninterrupted service.
7. Compliance & Web Filtering
Continuously monitor web filter subnets and liaise with upstream providers to block URLs flagged by ATRA, ensuring permanent enforcement in full compliance with its official directives.
8. Additional Duties
Perform any other tasks as assigned by management to support network operations and service delivery.

Job Requirements
Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, or a related field. Preference will be given to candidates with a Master’s degree in a related major field.
With a Bachelor’s degree: minimum of 5 years’ experience in system or network administration; with a Master’s degree: minimum of 3 years, preferably within an ISP environment.
CCNA and CCNP certifications are highly preferred.
Strong hands-on experience with Cisco, MikroTik, and Ubiquiti (UBQT) devices.
Advanced knowledge of network protocols, including TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and PPPoE.
Deep understanding of network security best practices and compliance with regulatory directives (e.g., ATRA).
Ability to analyze and resolve complex technical issues efficiently under pressure.
Excellent communication and reporting skills in Dari, Pashto, and English.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by Jun 30, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province. e.g: (UAT-VA-SA-2154-A - Kabul) .
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

Submission Email
vacancies@uatelecom.af

title: استاد در رشته های کمپیوتر ساینس،اقتصاد، شرعیات، ریاضیات و فزیک (Re Announced)
description:
About Jahan University
پوهنتون جهان یکی ازپوهنتون های معتبر در افغانستان است که در سرک سه کارته نو شهر کابل فعالیت می‌کند. این پوهنتون با هدف ارائه آموزش عالی معیاری در رشته‌های مختلف علمی و مسلکی ایجاد شده و در بخش‌های چون کمپیوترساینس، اقتصاد، حقوق، طب معالجوی، و شرعیات به سطح لیسانس و ماستری فعالیت می‌نماید. پوهنتون جهان همچنان در بخش تحقیق، آموزش عملی و همکاری‌های علمی تلاش دارد تا زمینه رشد علمی محصلان را فراهم سازد
جهان گروپ: شامل پوهنتون جهان، جهان کابل، 5 انستیتیوت طبی و 17 باب لیسه عالی در شهر کابل میباشد. که حدودا 20000 شاگرد و محصل در این نهاد های آموزشی، آموزش میبیند.

Job Description
۱-رهنمایی اعضای کادر علمی و محصلان طبق مقرره تحصیلات عالی؛
۲-ارزیابی آثار و کنفرانس های علمی اعضای کادر علمی و سایر دانشمندان و ابراز نظر در رابطه به آنها؛
۳-اشتراک فعال در محافل علمی منحیث گرداننده، سخنران و یا اشتراک کننده؛
۴-اشتراک فعال در کمیته ها، مجالس و شورا های علمی؛
۵-سهمگیری مسولانه در بهبود امور پوهنحی و موسسه تحصیلات عالی مربوطه به منظور انکشاف پیشرفت علمی و حفظ منافع و مصلحت های موسسه؛
۶-ارتقای سویه ی دانش به ویژه در رشته ی اختصاصی و کسب مهارت های مانند: آموزش یک زبان معتبر بین المللی و کمپیوتر؛
۷-تهییه لکچر نوت ها و رهنمود کار های علمی – ساحوی و لابراتواری؛
۸-رهبری و اشتراک در تالیف کتابهای درسی، ممد درسی و مرجع؛
۱۰- عضو فعال در تحقیقات علمی؛
۱۱-اشتراک در امتحانات ورودی محصلان جدیدشمول؛
۱۲-سایر فعالیت ها و وظایف که در قانون تحصیلات عالی و مؤسسه تحصیلات عالی جهان پیش بینی شده است؛

Job Requirements
حد اقل دارنده تحصیلات عالی به سویه ماستر در رشته های اقتصاد،کمپیوتر ساینس، شرعیات،
حد اقل سه سال تجربه کاری در بخش تدریس در سطح پوهنتون را دارا باشد .
توانایی و مهارت برنامه های آفیس کمپیوتر راداشته باشد
تسلط کامل به زبان های ملی (دری و پشتو) و انگلیسی بلدیت داشته باشد.
توانایی رهبری و پیشبرد تحقیقات علمی را داشته باشد.

Submission Guideline
از عمومی متقاضیان گرامی که واجد شرایط هستند، خلص سوانح خویش همرای اسکن اسناد تحصیلی،تذکره تابعیت و اسکن قرارداد خط/سند تجربه کاری را با نوشتن نام پوهنحی مربوطه و ذکر ووکنسی نمبر به ایمیل آدرس های ذیل ارسال بدارند یا هارد آنرا تسلیم آمریت منابع بشری این نهاد تسلیم نمااید.

title: Software Developer
description:
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company
Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company is a trusted provider of IT solutions, software development, and digital transformation services in Afghanistan. Our mission is to empower businesses with innovative technology solutions that enhance efficiency, security, and scalability.
With a team of experienced professionals, we specialize in custom software development, enterprise solutions, cloud computing, and IT infrastructure services . We are committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions that help organizations stay competitive in the digital world.
Our Services
Software Development: Custom web and mobile applications using Laravel, React, Next.js, and more.
Enterprise IT Solutions: ERP, MIS, CRM, and custom business software.
IT Consultancy: Digital strategy, system integration, and cybersecurity.
Cloud Solutions: AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge, and cloud-based deployments.
E-Commerce Development: Scalable online store solutions with secure payment gateways.
Why Choose Us?
Expert Team: Skilled professionals with expertise in software engineering and IT solutions.
Quality & Security: Industry-standard practices ensuring high-performance and secure applications.
Client-Focused Approach: Tailored solutions that align with business needs.
Reliable Support: Ongoing maintenance and technical support for seamless operations.
Our Vision
To be a leading technology service provider in Afghanistan, driving digital innovation and business growth.
Our Mission
To develop reliable, scalable, and high-performance technology solutions that help businesses streamline their operations and achieve success.
Job Summary

Job Descriptions
We are seeking a highly skilled Laravel Developer to join our dynamic team at Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company . The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Laravel, PHP, and modern web development technologies and will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable, and high-performance web applications.
This role requires a deep understanding of MVC architecture, database management, and front-end technologies . As a Laravel Developer, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build secure applications, integrate APIs, optimize performance , and troubleshoot technical challenges.

Job Requirements
Proven experience (2+ years) as a Laravel Developer or in a similar role.
Proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and object-oriented programming (OOP) .
Strong knowledge of MVC architecture and best coding practices.
Experience in front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js).
Familiarity with Laravel Blade templating and Livewire (preferred but not mandatory).
Hands-on experience with RESTful API development and third-party API integration .
Understanding of security best practices , including data encryption and secure authentication.
Experience with queues, cron jobs, and background task processing in Laravel .
Knowledge of Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, or GitLab for version control .
Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills.
Familiarity with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) .
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or within a team.

Submission Guidelines
Vacancy Number: Please mention the vacancy number in the email subject line .
CV & Previous Projects: Applicants must attach their CV and a list with links of previous projects they have worked on.
Email Submission: Send your application to hushmandshahar@gmail.com before the deadline.

Submission Email
hushmandshahar@gmail.com
